headline: Assessing Target’s Valuation As Recent Share Price Momentum Draws Investor Attention
summary: Why Target stock is on investors’ radar today Target (TGT) is drawing fresh attention after a strong year to date share price move, with the stock showing gains over the past month and past 3 months that stand out against its recent multi year record. See our latest analysis for Target. At a share price of $129.72, Target’s recent momentum is clear, with a 30 day share price return of 8.24% and a 90 day share price return of 24.61%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 40.77%...
